'''Zhann''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Zhann system/Legends|Zhann system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] and known for its puppet shows.

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Nightmare Machine]]'' {{1stm}}
